calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition For Order Releasing Mechanics Lien Pursuant To Civil Code Sections 8480 Et Seq.
Off Calendar Dec-20-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Jennifer P. Tang, Esq., NOMOS LLP (510) 930-3300 jtang@nomosllp.com Attorney for Petitioner 4029-4033 JUDAH LLC
No other appearances

Not ARGUED. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER 4029-4033 JUDAH LLC, A LIMITEED LIABILITY COMPANY Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition For Order Releasing Mechanics Lien Pursuant To Civil Code Sections 8480 Et Seq.

Petitioner's unopposed petition for order releasing mechanic's lien is granted.

Order and Judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
